creator: claude.com

evidence.text: "With Managed Agents, our power users become like Galileo, contributing across domains far beyond a single specialty or discipline,” Kaji said. “We deploy each specialist agent within a week, managing long-running tasks across engineering, product, sales, marketing, and finance, generating apps, proposal decks, and spreadsheets in sandboxed environments. As agents become more capable, Managed Agents lets us scale safely without building agentic infrastructure ourselves, so we can focus entirely on democratizing innovation across the company."
